name: Filet De Tofu with Apricot Dijon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, pan-fry the onion and garlic in oil until fragrant.
2. Gradually add tamari, mustard, orange juice, and apricot puree to the pan.
3. Stir continuously until you have a smooth sauce.
4. In a separate pan, fry the tofu slices in oil until golden brown.
5. Add the fried tofu to the sauce and cook over low heat until the sauce reduces by half.
6. Place the tofu in a serving dish.
7. Garnish with chopped scallions and dill.
8. Serve with stir-fried vegetables, rice, or a salad.
